message:
fix(transport,service): mock corruption clears verified flag, sink send_all prevents iterator double-advance, load balancer drops lock before strategy callback

Three transport/service layer fixes:

src/transport/mock.rs — corrupt_symbol no longer preserves the is_verified
flag on corrupted symbols: it always returns an unverified symbol. Previously,
a corrupted symbol could still carry a verified=true flag, which would bypass
downstream integrity checks that gate on verification status. Removed unused
verified variable. Added test corrupted_symbol_is_no_longer_marked_verified.

src/transport/sink.rs — SendAllFuture now tracks iter_exhausted separately,
preventing double-advance of the iterator on re-poll after a Pending flush.
Previously, if the inner sink returned Pending during a flush, the next poll
would re-consume the iterator from the beginning (since the future was
re-entered), causing duplicate sends. The flush is now only attempted after
the iterator has been fully consumed.

src/service/load_balance.rs — LoadBalancer::push now explicitly drops the
backends lock guard before calling strategy.on_backend_inserted(index).
This prevents holding the backends mutex during the strategy callback, which
could deadlock if the strategy implementation needs to inspect the backend
list or acquire other locks that depend on backends.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
